What We Do

SERVICES

We supply steel and arrange what's needed to get it to you — simple as that.

01
Steel Supply
Full range of structural steel — TMT bars, MS angles, channels, plates, pipes, round bars and flat bars. All grades, all sizes. Ready stock, competitive rates. We supply to contractors, builders, factories, and fabricators.
02
Cutting
In-house cutting to your required lengths and dimensions. Bring your measurements or bar bending schedule. Machine cutting ensures clean ends and accurate lengths. Minimal cutting charges on bulk orders.
03
Transport
We arrange delivery to your site within the Nagpur region. Vehicle available for bulk orders. Call to confirm your location and quantity — we'll sort the logistics. Pickup from our Ghaas Bazaar yard also available same day.
04
Bulk Orders
Volume discounts for large orders. Ideal for construction projects, factory requirements, and regular contractor needs. Call us with your full requirement list and we'll give you the best rate.

Common Questions

FAQ

Questions contractors and builders ask before ordering.

Which TMT grade is right for my building?
+
Fe500 is standard for most residential RCC work. Fe500D is recommended for Seismic Zone III and IV (which includes most of Nagpur) — the 'D' means higher ductility, so the bar bends instead of snapping in an earthquake. Fe550 is for heavy industrial structures. Not sure? Tell us your zone and we'll advise.
What is the minimum order quantity?
+
No minimum for pickup from our Ghaas Bazaar yard. For arranged delivery, minimum 1 ton is preferred to make transport cost-effective. Smaller quantities — just pick it up yourself, we'll have it ready.
Do you provide test certificates?
+
Yes. Mill Test Certificates (MTC) available for BIS certified stock showing chemical composition and tensile data. Important for government or tendered projects — request at time of ordering.
How far do you arrange transport?
+
We arrange transport within Nagpur and surrounding areas. Cost depends on quantity and distance. Call or WhatsApp with your site address and order size and we'll quote a delivery rate.
Can you cut steel to my dimensions?
+
Yes — in-house cutting available. Bring your bar bending schedule or just your dimensions. For large BBS jobs, call ahead so we can prepare. Cutting charges are minimal and often waived on bulk orders.
What steel is needed for earthquake zones?
+
IS 13920 (ductile detailing code) requires Fe500D for seismic zones III and IV. Nagpur falls in Zone III. The 'D' grade has controlled carbon and higher elongation — it won't snap under seismic stress. Always verify with your structural engineer's drawings.
What payment methods do you accept?
+
Cash, UPI (PhonePe, Google Pay, Paytm), NEFT/RTGS bank transfer, and net banking. GST invoices issued for all transactions. Regular contractors can discuss credit terms after first few orders.
